ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the school belongs */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the district office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the district */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the server is located */,
  "server_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to each server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "hardware_specifications" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the server */,
  "software_versions" TEXT /* Installed software versions on the server */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., Tools only, Modules only, Tools with Modules) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the activity */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the activity (1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server where the activity occurred */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity type */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of activities recorded */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the activity (if applicable) */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool used (if applicable) */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module used (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, teacher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school (if applicable) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district (if applicable) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the school or district */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions granted to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the access control was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "last_generated" TEXT /* Last time the report was generated */,
  "next_generation_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled generation date */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
